content:
Find ALL free models available on OpenRouter (openrouter.ai). I need:
1. Complete list of models with "free" or "$0" pricing
2. The exact model IDs used in API calls (e.g., "meta-llama/llama-3-8b-instruct:free")
3. Which models are best for: coding, vision/multimodal, fast grep/search, reasoning

Search OpenRouter's model listings, docs, and any community lists. Return a structured list with model ID, capability category, and any rate limits.
<!-- OMO_INTERNAL_INITIATOR -->
